# Feature Spec: [Feature Name]

## Problem

What pain point does this feature address? Who feels it and when? Be specific — name the user type and the scenario.

## Solution

Describe what we're building. Cover the user-facing behavior, not the implementation details. A reader should finish this section knowing exactly what the feature does from the user's perspective.

## User Impact

How does this change the user's day-to-day? What becomes possible that wasn't before? What existing workflow gets shorter or easier?

## Release Notes (one-liner)

Write a single sentence suitable for a changelog entry. Start with a verb. Example: "Adds real-time failure alerts via email and Slack so operators learn about broken workflows before their clients do."
